name: api
description: Backend API for Slotify scheduling platform

scripts.vercel-build: mkdir -p ../../.vercel/output/static ../../.vercel/output/functions/index.func && echo '{"version":3,"routes":[{"src":"/(.*)","dest":"/index"}]}' > ../../.vercel/output/config.json && echo '{"status":"ok"}' > ../../.vercel/output/static/index.json && echo '{"runtime":"nodejs18.x","handler":"index.js","launcherType":"Nodejs"}' > ../../.vercel/output/functions/index.func/.vc-config.json && cp server.js package.json ../../.vercel/output/functions/index.func/ && cp -r routes controllers middleware models services utils ../../.vercel/output/functions/index.func/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp Link.js User.js Window.js ../../.vercel/output/functions/index.func/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r node_modules ../../.vercel/output/functions/index.func/ && echo 'module.exports=require("./server.js");' > ../../.vercel/output/functions/index.func/index.js
